name: 4pk 18.3 fl oz Simsbury Red Wine Glasses - Threshold™: Traditional Clear Glass, Dishwasher-Safe, BPA & Lead-Free, Set of 4
description:
Serve guests your favorite wines in elegant style at your next tasting or dinner party with this 4-Pack of Glass Red Wine Glasses from Threshold™. This set includes 4 clear glass wine glasses, which are designed with a bowl shape and short stem for serving red wine. Suitable for use with cold beverages only, these red wine glasses also feature a dishwasher-safe construction for easy cleaning.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
